gui.beatblock.title: BeatBlock
beatblock.tooltip.reset_layout: Restore default dock splits (sidebar/bottom bar ratios). Panel visibility stays as-is.
beatblock.tooltip.save_layout: Write window docking and sizes to config/beatblock/imgui.ini in the game directory.
beatblock.tooltip.load_layout: Reload window docking from imgui.ini (requires a prior save or existing file).
beatblock.tooltip.smart_auto_map: Auto-generate block animations, camera moves, and particles from music
beatblock.tooltip.generate_rhythm_drop: Generate RhythmDrop events from the current block selection on beats (select landing blocks first)
beatblock.about.description: Import music, analyze beats and frequency bands, and choreograph block animations, camera moves, and particles on the timeline for performances that dance with the music.
beatblock.tool.title: Tools
beatblock.tool.smart_auto_map.tooltip: Generate timeline events (block animations, camera, particles, etc.) from imported music. Not tied to the current selection.
beatblock.tool.stage_object.hint: Select blocks, then create an object for timeline animation events.
beatblock.tool.select_blocks_first: ⚠ Select blocks with the tool above first
beatblock.tool.quick_create.tooltip:
One-click create: auto name, default params
Good for getting started quickly
beatblock.tool.precise_create.tooltip: Keep the current block set (no bounding-box expansion), good for irregular shapes
beatblock.tool.advanced.hint: Custom name and params. Defaults work for most cases.
beatblock.tool.created_hint:
✓ Created object: %s
You can now add timeline events and select this object
beatblock.marker.no_markers_hint: No markers yet. Create from the toolbar or double-click the ruler.
beatblock.marker.name: Name
beatblock.marker.set_in.tooltip: Set current marker as loop in point
beatblock.marker.set_out.tooltip: Set current marker as loop out point
beatblock.marker.loop_prev.tooltip: Set loop region from previous marker to this one
beatblock.marker.loop_next.tooltip: Set loop region from this marker to the next one
beatblock.event.title: Event Properties
beatblock.event.select_hint: Select a block animation event to edit its properties here.
beatblock.event.track_locked: Track is locked; properties are read-only.
beatblock.event.vfx.tooltip: APPEARANCE channel switches to this block at animation midpoint, then restores. Default: minecraft:gold_block
beatblock.event.pacing_mode.tooltip: Parkour: use Jump Distance (3D path distance). Build: use Beat Grid.
beatblock.event.edge_priority.tooltip: 0 = no edge priority | 1 = prioritize edge blocks
beatblock.event.phase.tooltip: Percentages should sum to 100% (e.g. 20% in, 60% hold, 20% out)
beatblock.event.rhythm_drop.hint: Landing coords and fall height define visual block hit; impact threshold controls particle trigger (default 0.92).
beatblock.event.meteor.hint: Fall height and lateral scatter control WORLD_TRAJECTORY path; optional single-block landing.
beatblock.event.landing.tooltip: Leave empty to use target StageObject blocks; set to animate only that coordinate.
beatblock.event.impact_threshold.tooltip: Triggers rhythm_impact particles at this animation progress; RhythmDrop lateral scatter is fixed at 0.
beatblock.event.invalid_number: Invalid time, duration, or energy format.
beatblock.camera.title: Camera Properties
beatblock.camera.track_locked: Track is locked; properties are read-only.
beatblock.camera.path.hint: Path mode: keyframe interpolation; edit params on keyframe events.
beatblock.camera.non_path_warning: ⚠ Current clip is not PATH; keyframe pose params are not used by the camera.
beatblock.layer.title: Build Layers
beatblock.layer.hint: Create a layer from selection → click eye to hide → drag onto Build Restore track to bind playback. Blocks in a layer cannot be selected into another layer.
beatblock.layer.name: Layer name
beatblock.layer.tooltip.bound_visibility: Bound to track; visibility follows clip playhead
beatblock.layer.tooltip.hide: Currently visible; click to hide (world blocks become air)
beatblock.layer.tooltip.show: Currently hidden; click to show (restore captured blocks)
beatblock.layer.delete_confirm: Delete layer "%s"? This cannot be easily undone outside the panel.
beatblock.layer.delete_hidden_hint: Layer is hidden; world blocks will be restored before deletion.
beatblock.layer.hide_first: Hide the layer before dragging to track
beatblock.rhythm_drop.title: Rhythm Drop
beatblock.rhythm_drop.hint: Select landing blocks in the world, then generate visual fall animations on beats (writes to Block Animation track). Each event lands on its coordinate; impact triggers particles without changing real blocks.
beatblock.rhythm_drop.start_next_beat: Start on next beat (otherwise first lands at playhead)
beatblock.rhythm_drop.target.tooltip: Auto anchor is for timeline reference only; each event's singleBlock param defines the actual landing.
beatblock.rhythm_drop.generate.tooltip: Import music for feature-track beats; without beats, events use fixed Timeline BPM spacing.
beatblock.selection.title: Block Selection
beatblock.selection.operation_hint: New = replace selection. Click tools (plane slice, selection wand): hold Shift to add. Brush/lasso paint works the same.
Block center to camera cannot exceed this distance. Applies to lasso, wand, slice, box/line/column/brush.
beatblock.selection.fill.tooltip: When block selection UI is open and count is modest, draw translucent faces on outer surfaces (merged with outline); large selections show bounding box only.
beatblock.selection.max_blocks.tooltip: Box/line (incl. cylinder thickness)/brush/column/slice volume, connected & wand expansion, brush stamp — refuse or truncate above this count.
beatblock.selection.line_thickness.toolt: 0: blocks on center polyline only; >0: cylinder around endpoints axis with this radius (Euclidean distance to axis).
beatblock.selection.brush_size.tooltip: Sphere: Euclidean distance ≤ r; Cube: axis-aligned edge length 2r+1. Scene preview shows envelope; click or drag to paint.
beatblock.selection.plane_hint: Auto: use hit face. When locked, slice position still uses clicked block coords (e.g. horizontal uses clicked Y).
beatblock.selection.wand_hint: Default: flood by block type (same ID in 6-neighborhood). Single-cell selection: try Full Block State for stricter match.
beatblock.selection.wand_spread.tooltip: From seed block, cells beyond this Euclidean distance are excluded (global and selection wand).
beatblock.selection.full_state.tooltip: On: exact BlockState match; Off: block type only.
beatblock.selection.box_in_progress: Box in progress: corner A = %d, %d, %d. Move mouse in scene to preview, then click B.
beatblock.selection.line_in_progress: Line in progress: endpoint A = %d, %d, %d. Move mouse to preview, then click B.
beatblock.selection.rhythm_drop_hint: Use current selection as landing blocks; generate RhythmDrop events from playhead and beats.
beatblock.animation_library.title: Animation Library
beatblock.animation_library.hint: %d built-in block animation presets. Expand entries for channel curves; apply via Event Properties → Animation preset.
beatblock.timeline.no_stage_object.toolt: Create a StageObject in the Tools panel (select blocks → create) first, or Binding Map cannot generate events
beatblock.timeline.binding_map.tooltip: Batch-convert audio features to animation events via binding rules; creates default rules if none exist
beatblock.timeline.binding_editor.toolti: Edit feature binding rules: source feature, action, target, threshold, and cooldown
beatblock.timeline.auto_map.tooltip: Auto-generate animation events from band events (import music first)
beatblock.timeline.bake_step.tooltip: Bake dispatchModel=STEP events into N absolute-time BURST events (Undo supported); requires StageObject and reference beats
beatblock.timeline.rhythm_drop.tooltip: Generate RhythmDrop events from block selection on beats (writes to Block Animation track); select landing blocks first
beatblock.timeline.snap.tooltip: Snap events to grid while dragging
beatblock.timeline.beat_snap.tooltip: Snap events to beats while dragging
beatblock.timeline.loop_in.tooltip: Set current time as loop in; or Alt+left-click ruler
beatblock.timeline.loop_out.tooltip: Set current time as loop out; or Alt+right-click ruler
beatblock.timeline.track_height.tooltip: Adjust audio track (waveform/bands) height for rhythm detail
beatblock.timeline.track_height_reset.to: Reset audio track to default height
beatblock.timeline.rollback.tooltip: PLACE/CLEAR preview rollback: Preview restores blocks on stop/seek; Persistent keeps writes
beatblock.timeline.transport.back_beat: Back 1 beat (1 s without BPM); Shift+click back 5 s
beatblock.timeline.transport.fwd_beat: Forward 1 beat (1 s without BPM); Shift+click forward 5 s
beatblock.timeline.transport.add_marker: Create marker at current time; or double-click ruler
beatblock.automap.title: Auto Map Settings
beatblock.automap.description: Auto-generate from music analysis: block animations, camera, particles, and rhythm structure.
beatblock.automap.style.tooltip: EDM=strong beats/explosive, Cinematic=slow-mo/waves, Ambient=soft, Chaos=dense, Minimal=sparse
beatblock.automap.particles.tooltip: Generate particle events from high-frequency energy
beatblock.audio.demucs.tooltip:
Affects only newly added or resubmitted tasks
Queued tasks keep their locked mode
Off uses librosa-only Basic fast analysis
beatblock.audio.auto_start_hint: Tip: analysis starts automatically after selecting a file
beatblock.audio.select_asset_hint:
Click an audio item
in the list to view details
beatblock.audio.queue_hint: Analyzer runs serially; next task starts when the current one finishes. You can keep adding files; they are processed in order.
beatblock.audio.queue_drag_hint: Tip: drag queue items in the left list to reorder.
beatblock.audio.demucs_warning: Demucs was requested but Basic was used. Usually means Demucs unavailable, fallback, or Basic cache hit.
beatblock.audio.drop_zone_hint: Drop audio file / click + to select
beatblock.audio.queue_auto_start: Tasks start automatically in queue order
beatblock.audio.queue_drag_reorder: Drag queue items here to change priority
beatblock.audio.clear_completed.tooltip: Remove all completed items from the list (does not delete beatmap files)
beatblock.audio.convert_not_implemented: Conversion request recorded. Auto converter not available yet; convert to MP3/WAV manually and retry.
beatblock.audio.stem_mute_hint: Tip: mute/solo on timeline audio sub-tracks. Drum feature tracks (kick/snare/hihat) affect the drums stem together.
beatblock.audio.demucs_fallback_detail: Result from Basic cache or Demucs fallback; no drums/bass/vocals/other split files. Re-analyze with Demucs dependencies available to view splits.
beatblock.audio.reanalyze_demucs.tooltip: Delete beatmap and stem cache for this audio, then re-analyze in Demucs mode
beatblock.audio.reanalyze_basic.tooltip: Delete beatmap and stem cache for this audio, then re-analyze in Basic mode
beatblock.audio.compare_demucs.tooltip: Clear cache and re-run with Demucs to compare with current result
beatblock.audio.compare_basic.tooltip: Clear cache and re-run with Basic to compare with current result
beatblock.audio.pending_hint: Not analyzed yet. Click Start analysis to submit.
beatblock.audio.path_invalid: Invalid path or file does not exist
beatblock.camera.select_hint: Select a camera clip or keyframe to edit properties here.
beatblock.message.select_landing_blocks: Select at least one landing block first
beatblock.message.no_feature_beats: No feature-track beats; using fixed BPM spacing
beatblock.message.no_selection_bounds: No block selection or bounds available.
beatblock.message.corners_filled: Filled A and B from selection bounding box.
beatblock.message.engine_not_initialized: Animation engine not initialized; cannot create object.
beatblock.message.no_world_context: No world context; cannot read selection.
beatblock.message.set_corners_first: Set both A and B corner points first.
beatblock.message.selection_too_large: Selection too large (%d blocks), limit is %d.
beatblock.message.no_solid_blocks: No non-air blocks in selection; no object created.
beatblock.message.no_block_selection: No block selection. Use the selection tool first.
beatblock.message.layer_name_taken: Name already used by another layer: %s
beatblock.message.all_blocks_claimed: All blocks in selection already belong to other layers.
beatblock.message.layer_created_skipped: Created layer: %s (skipped %d blocks already in other layers)
beatblock.timeline.binding.no_features: No feature tracks available. Import and analyze audio first.
beatblock.timeline.binding.no_rules: No rules. Click Create Defaults or Add Rule.
beatblock.timeline.binding.template.tool: Rule template: Replace or Append into the current rule set
beatblock.timeline.binding.append.toolti: Keep existing rules and append template (deduplicated)
beatblock.timeline.binding.name: Name
beatblock.timeline.interaction.delete_au: Warning: deletion includes the top audio clip. If the audio track becomes empty, waveform and analysis data will be cleared.
beatblock.timeline.interaction.track_loc: Track is locked. Editing is disabled.
beatblock.timeline.demucs.title: Demucs Mapping
beatblock.timeline.demucs.preset.tooltip: Demucs mapping preset: Drive=stronger rhythm, Detail=finer detail, Balanced=balanced
beatblock.timeline.demucs.clip_mode.tool: Clip generation: Trigger=short hits, Sustain=sustained segments, Mixed=auto per feature
beatblock.timeline.demucs.label: Demucs
beatblock.track.tooltip.rename_audio:
Double-click to rename track
Alt+scroll: adjust audio track height
Alt+MMB: reset audio track height
beatblock.track.tooltip.cam_keyframe: Add path keyframe at playhead (must be inside a custom path segment)
beatblock.event.badge.dispatch_step:
Dispatch: STEP
Advances sequence on each beat event.
beatblock.event.badge.dispatch_burst:
Dispatch: BURST
Triggers the group animation immediately at event time.
beatblock.event.badge.inherit_spatial:
Inherit group spatial: ON
spatialMode/sequentialDelaySeconds are resolved from target group when not overridden.
beatblock.event.badge.frustum_gating:
Frustum Gating: ON
Pauses STEP progression when target group is outside camera view.
beatblock.event.badge.edge_priority:
Edge Priority: %.0f%%
Prioritizes silhouette blocks early in progression.
